name: Resistant Starch
summary: Decision-ready summary: Resistant Starch is best framed for gut microbiome support; insulin sensitivity context; satiety support; safety screen: IBS/FODMAP sensitivity; bloating-prone users.
description: Resistant starch is fermented by gut microbes to produce SCFAs, which can influence insulin signaling, satiety signaling, and microbiome stability.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
